home.title: Paste2Quiz
home.description: Generate a quiz from your notes, complete it, and review detailed results.

hero.eyebrow: Turn any notes into a live challenge
hero.subtitle: Paste your content, launch a polished quiz flow, and instantly discover what you actually remember.
hero.panelCopy: Use a simple @Q / @A syntax and let Paste2Quiz handle parsing, randomization, and result analysis.

features.heading: Why learners love us
features.subheading: Designed for quick drill sessions, exam prep, and self-checks that are easy to repeat.

one.title: Write once, quiz instantly
one.description: No setup friction. Paste your questions in a compact format and generate a complete quiz flow right away.

two.title: Built for real recall
two.description: Question and answer randomization keeps every attempt fresh, so you practice understanding instead of memorizing order.

three.title: Review what matters
three.description: See your score, compare your answers, and identify exact weak spots with a clean post-quiz breakdown.

steps.heading: How it works
steps.subheading: A focused three-step flow from notes to measurable progress.

one.title: Paste your quiz text
one.description: Add questions and answers using @Q, @A and @A* markers.

two.title: Generate and answer
two.description: Launch the quiz, move across questions, and complete all answers at your pace.

three.title: Measure and improve
three.description: Finish the session to see your score and a detailed review for each question.

finalCta.heading: Ready to challenge your notes?
finalCta.description: Open the quiz builder, paste your content, and run your first session now.

create.title: Create your quiz
create.placeholder: Paste your quiz text here using the format above...
create.questionCountLabel: How many questions should be in the quiz?
create.questionCountHint: A random subset will be selected from your pasted questions.

errors.noValidQuestions: No valid questions found. Please check your format!
errors.incompleteQuestion: Question {questionNumber} is incomplete. Make sure it has a question, answers, and a correct answer marked with @A*:.
errors.invalidQuestionCount: Enter a valid whole number greater than 0 for the number of questions.
errors.questionCountExceedsAvailable: You requested more questions than available. Found {available} valid questions.
errors.answerAllBeforeFinish: Please answer all questions before finishing the quiz!

results.great: Great job! You have a good understanding.
results.notBad: Not bad! Review the material and try again.
results.scoreSummary: You got {score} out of {total} questions correct.

error.notFound: The page you are looking for does not exist
